comment.text: This key displays the label "Effective date" in the Order Summary panel, specifically when a user is not exceeding their storage limit and is not on a new subscription. It appears as a row label indicating the date the change takes effect.

usage.context:
{!isExceedingStorageLimit && !isNewSubscription ? (
{isDowngradeStoragePlan ? t("EffectiveDate") : t("RemainingPeriod")}
